---
title: "Research"
---

## Ongoing Research 

### Time traits
[EDGE LAB](https://edge-ecology.com/) 

### The Past, Present and Future of Alpine Biomes Worldwide 

[PPF-Alpine](https://mountainsinmotion.w.uib.no/) aims to take a deep dive into the biogeographical history of alpine systems on a global scale and decipher the drivers of present-day alpine biodiversity.

### Arctic Gloria
[Ecology Group Unibasel](https://eco.duw.unibas.ch/en/) 
 
 
## PhD

**Unraveling the complexity of plant community responses to climate change**   
*Supervised by: [John Arvid Grytnes](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/John_Arvid_Grytnes),*       *[Suzette Flantua](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Suzette_Flantua)* and *[Fride Høistad         Schei](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Fride_Schei)*

  * Ecological Consortium on Resurvey Data [ECKO](https://ecko.uib.no/)
  * Effects of land use on long-term plant diversity and the temporal link between geodiversity and biodiversity

## Memberships

* [International Biogeography Society](www.biogeography.org/)  
* [Norwegian Ecological Society](https://nordicsocietyoikos.org/national-societies/norwegian-ecological-society)  
* [COLNADE Colegio nacional de ecólogos](https://www.colnade.co/)  

## Teaching

* ECKO's journal club at [University of Bergen](https://www.uib.no/en) 
* Introduction to Biology – Lecture with practical courses at [Unibasel](https://www.biozentrum.unibas.ch/bsc-in-biology) (60 hours)

## Contributions to #TidyTuesday

* **#TidyTuesday** is a weekly data project aimed at the R ecosystem and the `{tidyverse}` package bundle to wrangle, explore and visualize the data set that is provided by the [R4DS Online Learning Community](https://www.rfordatasci.com/).

  →  [All my contributions](https://github.com/Lacapary/T_Tuesday)

## Former projects

  * Assessing the impact of fragmentation on plant dispersal in Andean mountains. [Royal Botanical Gardens (KEW)](https://www.kew.org/science/our-science/departments/ecosystem-stewardship/spati al-analysis-and-data-science)
  * Patterns Changes of Land Use/Cover over Time in Río Grande, River Watershed—Spain: Intensification of the Irrigated Agriculture.[CEDLA](https://www.cedla.nl/)
  * Human-wildlife conflict: a review of patterns and priorities in Latin America. 
  * Colombian Ecosystems Red List (Vers.2.0)
<span style="color:#839192">Lista Roja de Ecosistemas de Colombia (Vers.2.0).</span> [link](https://doi.org/10.13140/rg.2.2.10861.08165)
  * National System of Indicators of Adaptation to Climate Change (SIACC): proposal of indicator protocols included in the system
<span style="color:#839192">Sistema Nacional de Indicadores de Adaptación al Cambio Climático (SIACC):propuesta de protocolos de indicadoresincluidos en el sistema</span>

## External positions

* [Arasari Conservation and Research](https://www.arasari-ci.com/)  - Founder
